scripts.prepare:x64: if not exist build\temp_x64 mkdir build\temp_x64 && cmake -B build/temp_x64 -G "Visual Studio 17 2022" -A x64 -DCMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY=../Release/x64
scripts.prepare:x32: if not exist build\temp_x32 mkdir build\temp_x32 && cmake -B build/temp_x32 -G "Visual Studio 17 2022" -A Win32 -DCMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY=../Release/x32
scripts.build:x64: npm run prepare:x64 && npm run compile:x64
scripts.build:x32: npm run prepare:x32 && npm run compile:x32
scripts.build:all: npm run build:x64 && npm run build:x32
